content_gaps.description: Competitors (Encore, OMNIA Dayclub, Palm Tree) publishing behind-the-scenes cabana/VIP preparation content that LIV is not actively matching

content_gaps.description: Competitors tagging and featuring influencers in carousels; LIV posts lack this cross-promotional leverage
content_gaps.suggested_action: Partner with 5-10 Vegas influencers for co-branded carousels featuring LIV events; guarantee top placement and tag back

content_gaps.description: OMNIA, Zouk, and others using countdown stickers for Friday/Saturday shows; creates urgency and repeat impressions
content_gaps.suggested_action: Add countdown stickers to Stories starting Wednesday for all weekend events
